LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE, INC.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. DEFENDANT NU CONCEPT MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC.'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. FIRST, ONLY A "NATURAL PERSON" CAN CLAIM AN EXEMPTION AND DEFENDANT IS A CORPORATION. (SEE CCP SEC. 703.020(A).) SECOND, THE PAID EARNINGS EXEMPTION OF CCP SEC. 704.070 APPLIES TO PAYEES. DEFENDANT IS ATTEMPTING TO INVOKE THE EXEMPTION AS A PAYOR. ANY MONEY THAT THE SHERIFF IS HOLDING SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-27-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE, INC.'s HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Defendant Nu Concept Management Group, Inc.'s claim of exemption is denied. First, only a "natural person" can claim an exemption and defendant is a corporation. (See CCP Sec. 703.020(a).) Second, the paid earnings exemption of CCP Sec. 704.070 applies to payees. Defendant is attempting to invoke the exemption as a payor. Any money that the sheriff is holding shall be released to the judgment creditor.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2019 Off Calendar
